checks.name: wrong_layer_or_one_layer_only
checks.evidence: Phone telemetry records layer_indices [0, 1], and comparator expected layer index 1 against the layer-1 RunPod reference.

checks.name: layer1_not_consuming_phone_layer0
checks.evidence: Stack runner feeds layer 0 output vector directly into layer 1 inside the phone process; layer0_output hash matches G1.

checks.name: cpu_fallback_masquerading_as_opencl
checks.evidence: Phone telemetry records backend opencl, opencl_libraries [libOpenCL.so, libOpenCL.so], and kernel_contract two_sequential_layer_forward_real_weights_no_cpu_fallback.

checks.name: pad_token_metric_inflation
checks.evidence: Comparator reports 111 non-pad tokens, 913 pad slots, and failed_token_count 0.

checks.name: comparator_tolerance_relaxation
checks.evidence: p50 threshold remained 0.99 and threshold_relaxed is false.

checks.name: g1_regression
checks.evidence: Layer 0 output inside the two-layer stack has sha256 cef523f674cff7ecd01cb59040048f9188f80bcb58b9fc47f1fa7f370ce332cf, matching the passed G1 output.

checks.name: forbidden_artifact_leakage
checks.evidence: Raw layer packs and phone output binaries stayed under /workspace artifacts, phone storage, and /tmp; only text/JSON reports are in git.

checks.name: training_claim_inflation
checks.evidence: Gate result explicitly limits promotion to G3 forward expansion and makes no backward, optimizer, data pipeline, training, or sustained run claim.
